ssa-1099:box3.label: Total benefits paid
ssa-1099:box3.so: Tani waa wadarta guud ee lacagta Social Security ee laguu bixiyay sanadkan, ka hor inta aan wax ka jarin.
ssa-1099:box3.en: This is the total Social Security money paid to you this year, before anything was taken out.

ssa-1099:box4.label: Benefits repaid
ssa-1099:box4.so: Tani waa lacag aad dib ugu celisay Social Security sanadkan, tusaale ahaan haddii lacag badan laguu siiyay.
ssa-1099:box4.en: This is money you paid back to Social Security this year, for example if you were overpaid.

ssa-1099:box5.label: Net benefits
ssa-1099:box5.so: Tani waa lacagta saafiga ah ee aad dhab ahaan heshay — waa wadarta lacagta (sanduuq 3) marka laga jarayo lacagta dib loo celiyay (sanduuq 4).
ssa-1099:box5.en: This is the actual amount you ended up with — the total paid (box 3) minus anything repaid (box 4).

ssa-1099:box6.label: Voluntary federal income tax withheld
ssa-1099:box6.soTitle: Canshuur ikhtiyaari ah oo horay loo jaray
ssa-1099:box6.so: Tani waa canshuur federaal ah oo aad si ikhtiyaari ah u codsatay in laga jaro lacagtaada hawlgabka, si aanad canshuur badan u bixin sanadka dambe.
ssa-1099:box6.en: This is federal tax you chose to have taken out of your Social Security payments, so you owe less at tax time.
